title: Stunning American Air Hostess Sharp Beautiful Facial
sourceTitle: Stunning American Air Hostess Sharp Beautiful Facial
prompt: A stunning American air hostess with sharp beautiful facial features, long voluminous wavy dark brown hair, standing elegantly in the aisle of a luxurious private jet cabin. She is wearing an attractive uniform: form-fitting shiny red patent leather bodysuit with thin straps and deep V-neckline, a little sign 'Keor' embroidered on border, long glossy red patent leather opera gloves, a small red pillbox hat tilted stylishly, a silk airline scarf, a golden wings pin on her chest, multi-strand pearl choker necklace, gold watch on her left wrist, black tights, and shiny black patent leather thigh-high stiletto boots.She is holding a silver serving tray with both hands, presenting gourmet appetizers and two glasses of champagne. She is standing with her body slightly angled, one leg forward, looking directly at the viewer with a confident smile. Soft warm cabin lighting, blue sky visible through the airplane windows, luxurious beige leather seats and wood accents in the background. Cinematic composition, photorealistic, highly detailed, 8k, sharp focus, elegant and luxurious atmosphere, vogue fashion photography style.
